args.query:
SELECT o.Id as OpportunityId, o.Name as OpportunityName, o.ContactId, o.AccountId, o.CloseDate, oi.Id as OpportunityLineItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName, p.Description
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OpportunityId
JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id
WHERE o.ContactId = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND o.CloseDate >= '2021-06-01'
  AND o.CloseDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Description LIKE '%AI%')

args.query:
SELECT o.Id as OpportunityId, o.Name as OpportunityName, o.CloseDate, o.StageName, o.Amount
FROM Opportunity o
WHERE o.ContactId = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND o.CloseDate >= '2021-06-01'
  AND o.CloseDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND o.StageName = 'Closed Won'

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.Id as OpportunityId, o.Name as OpportunityName, o.CloseDate, o.StageName, o.Amount
FROM Opportunity o
WHERE o.ContactId = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND o.CloseDate >= '2021-06-01'
  AND o.CloseDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND o.StageName = 'Closed Won'

  AND q.CreatedDate >= '2021-06-01'
  AND q.CreatedDate < '2021-07-01'

  AND o."EffectiveDate" >= '2021-06-01' 
  AND o."EffectiveDate" < '2021-07-01'
